title: Wedding Bell on the Battle Ground
overview: Five years ago, while battling an alien force known as the "Mimesis," Dannar pilot Goh Saruwatari first met Anna Aoi. Today, on the day of their wedding, the ceremony is interrupted when the Mimesis strike again. As Goh struggles in his battle against the alien threat, Anna stumbles upon a top secret robot known as the "Neo-Okusaer" and uses it as a last-resort to save her fiance. At that moment, Dannar and Neo-Okusaer merge to become the mighty robot "Godannar.

title: Flaming Virgin Road
overview: As Anna begins her rigerous training as a robot pilot, she and Goh also try to adjust to their first days of living together. After a silly argument which has Anna go into town to blow off some steam, the mimetec they fought last week appears, attacking Anna directly.

title: Battle Royal Honeymoon
overview: When a Mimetec appears in the South China Sea, robot teams from several nations gather to battle it. Meanwhile, Anna and Goh vow to battle together through thick and thin.

title: Shizuru's Comeback
overview: Shizuru begins to question if she belongs on Dannar base any longer, especially after Goh and Anna are hurt in battle. But after encouragement from Anna, Shizuru's confidence is rejuvinated and she, Anna, and Goh defeat the latest Mimetec threat.

title: A Girl From the Sky
overview: When Astro Base is attacked by a Mimetec, Lou is forced to eject to Earth while her father stays to protect the base. When Lou and Goh return to the base to keep it from crashing in Earth, they end up fighting the Mimetec to avenge Lou's father.

title: Death By Reminiscence
overview: The newly revived Max steals Myra away, leading to a confrontation with Goh, whom he blames for losing her in the first place.

title: The Graceful Shooting Star
overview: In the wake of Max' attack, Knight Valentine stirs up trouble, one woman at a time.

title: The Castaway Survival
overview: After the fighters crash on an island, Dannar Base begins to send out rescue ships. Go, Anna, Knight, and Ellis inspect the damage to their robots. Okusaer and Dannar can move, but the jetboys are heavily damaged, so the four of them are stuck there.

title: A Flawless Departure
overview: Lu is reprimanded for her actions while Goh encounters the rogue mech pilot.

title: Those Who Have Departed
overview: With Godannar and Neo-Okusaer out of commission, the only one to challenge a new Mimetic threat is Shizuru.

title: Last First Kiss
overview: While the base reels at the loss of one of their own, Anna continues to sort things out.

title: The Reviving Soul
overview: While in a state of limbo, a fallen mech pilot relives the events of the series.

title: It's Name is Go Okusaer!
overview: A new player for Anna's affections and hand in marriage has come into play. While she sorts out this new monkey wrench in her life, a new robot is unveiled.

title: Tonko, My Love
overview: The perspective is altered, focusing on some of the mechanics that keep Godannar and the other mechs running.

title: Ice-cold Smile
overview: As our main characters train, emotional turmoil mounts in Russia.

title: Sorrowful Song of the Plum Blossoms
overview: A pair of pilots become closer and the strange plague that killed Max is identified.

title: Godannar Ground Order!
overview: Given the severity of the Insania Virus, Goh is forbidden from piloting.

title: Crash! Dannar vs. Gainer
overview: Ken's long search is over.

title: Dannar Base S.O.S!
overview: With Goh's risks of succumbing to Insania rising, it's up to his wife, ex, and friend to defend Dannar Base as countless beasts strike.

title: After the Mortal Combat
overview: Tetsuya takes command of the Base, Goh is missing from sick bay, and a new wave of enemies begin to converge.

title: The Eternal Couple
overview: Ken has arrived, almost completely under the sway of Insania. Goh, not far behind is madly attacking everything in sight, leaving Myra to make good ob a certain vow.

title: The Inevitable Tomorrow
overview: It's been years since the fateful, climactic battle. People grow older; they move on. One woman's love, however, remains unchanged.
